untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'Deliberation' candlestick pattern which requires proprietary pattern recognition not available in allowed indicators. Specific entry conditions depend on pattern identification logic not expressible with available technical indicators. Author explicitly withheld success rates, stop loss methodology, volume trends, and pullback thresholds (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Performance parameters ('meager gains') are qualitative without numerical thresholds. Pattern detection requires multi-bar candle analysis beyond scope of individual indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: This signal cannot be reliably translated to rule-based conditions because: (1) The core entry condition is a named candlestick pattern ('Deliberation') requiring pattern recognition beyond available indicators; (2) Critical parameters are explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT including success rates, stop loss placement, and volume behavior; (3) Exit conditions are undefined; (4) Direction is context-dependent but no regime conditions distinguish long vs short setup. A backtest would require custom pattern detection code or manual candle identification.
